title: Feedback from Acme Robotics — Dashboards
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Acme Robotics (Enterprise)
NPS score: 3
Product area: Dashboards

Comment: The dashboard takes 12 seconds to load when I have more than 8 widgets. It's unusable for our morning standup.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Bulk user provisioning (SCIM)'.

title: Feedback from Zephyr Logistics — User Management & SSO
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Zephyr Logistics (Mid-Market)
NPS score: 6
Product area: User Management & SSO

Comment: We cannot roll out to the whole company because there is no SAML SSO. IT is blocking us.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Scheduled report exports'.

title: Feedback from Acme Robotics — Search
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Acme Robotics (Enterprise)
NPS score: 5
Product area: Search

Comment: Search only looks in the current workspace. I can never find docs from other teams.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Global search across workspaces'.
